Master electrifying bullet ballet combat to overcome ferocious enemies in the new game from Returnal creator Housemarque, available April 30th on PS5. Available now

Raise the Black Flag again
The ultimate pirate adventure returns, rebuilt for an enhanced experience on PS5. Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced arrives on PS5 July 9th. Find out more
Rise against Mephisto

Master two new classes and fight across the lands of Skovos. Diablo IV's story continues in the Lord of Hatred expansion - out now. Buy now ## H2: Add something special to your collection with amazing savings on a huge range of games until May. Shop now

Discover PlayStation Plus
Play hundreds of incredible PS5, PS4 and classic PlayStation games, and discover epic adventures, unique indies, family favorites, and everything in between.
PlayStation Plus Premium
Enjoy all the PlayStation Plus benefits from the Extra and Essential plans, plus exclusive benefits like game trials, cloud streaming, and the Classics Catalog.
PlayStation Plus Extra
Download and play hundreds of PS5 and PS4 games from the Game Catalog, on top of all benefits from PlayStation Plus Essential.
PlayStation Plus Essential
New games to play each month, online multiplayer, exclusive PS Store discounts and more, available with all three PlayStation Plus membership plans. Discover PlayStation Plus
